_comment: Source of truth for the FOUR monthly Google Search Console progress metrics, judged against the Phase 0 baseline. Committed to git (the raw GSC CSV exports are gitignored and disposable) so the trend survives. Append one snapshot per month via `npm run seo:gsc-progress`. The four metrics: (1) indexed_pages — GSC > Indexing > Pages > 'Indexed' count; (2) referring_domains_earned — auto-derived from data/backlinks/referring-domains-history.json; (3) branded_impressions — GSC > Performance, Query regex (?i)prestyj, last 28d; (4) target_keywords_top10 / avg_position — auto-derived from the latest data/keyword-rankings/<date>/ CSV. Realistic lag: backlinks take ~6-10 weeks to move rankings, so a flat ranking/branded line inside that window is EXPECTED, not failure.

lag_model.indexing_to_ranking_note: New/refreshed pages get indexed in days-to-weeks but earn stable positions only after links + engagement accrue. Judge indexed_pages monthly; judge rankings on the 6-10 week lag from the link/content push, not the month it shipped.
lag_model.branded_lag_days: 2-10 days after Meta spend ramps (see docs/branded-search-accelerant.md)

metrics.indexed_pages: GSC > Indexing > Pages > 'Indexed' count. Denominator = sitemap_submitted_urls.
metrics.referring_domains_earned: Independent referring domains we did NOT create ourselves. Auto-derived from referring-domains-history.json (earned_count).
metrics.branded_impressions_28d: GSC > Performance > Search results, Query filter Custom(regex) (?i)prestyj, date range last 28 days. Record impressions, clicks, avg position.
metrics.target_keywords: 19 priority commercial keywords. Count in top 10 + avg position of those found. Auto-derived from latest data/keyword-rankings/<date>/ CSV.

sitemap_submitted_urls_note: Indexable URLs declared by src/app/sitemap.ts on 2026-06-04: 56 static + 289 indexable blog posts + 39 alternatives + 12 solutions + 82 best-for + 44 compare + 17 free-ads + 21 locations + 102 stat + 26 industry. Re-derive when the sitemap changes; this is the indexed_pages denominator.

snapshots.note: Phase 0 baseline. GSC-only fields (indexed_pages, branded_*) are null until the first post-verification GSC pull; fill them on the first monthly run per docs/gsc-progress-tracker.md. referring_domains_earned=3 (linkedin.com, oppy.pro, thelazyagent.com) from referring-domains-history.json. Target keywords: 4 of 19 in top 10 (batch-video + multifamily voice-agent clusters), avg position 6.5 of the 4 found. Honest starting line; the other 15 commercial terms are not yet on page one. Judge rankings/branded on the ~6-10 week backlink lag, not the month work shipped.
